IDirectMusicSegment8::Download

Obsolete. DirectMusic now loads the any wave data or DLS collection that the segment references when the segment is loaded, so this method is no longer needed.

HRESULT Download(
    IUnknown *pAudioPath
);

Requirements

  Header: Declared in Dmusici.h.
